case_title: JUDITH ANN BASOLO VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BASOLO, JUDITH ANN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASOLO, JUDITH ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY A DELAWARE CORPORATION $608.49 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $788.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
